description: Leading quality engineering strategy across multiple product teams, building scalable test automation frameworks, and driving CI/CD adoption.
highlights: Architected a cross-team test automation framework reducing test authoring time by 60%
Established CI/CD pipelines with automated quality gates for 12 microservices
Mentored 8 engineers on test automation best practices and TDD methodologies
Reduced production defect escape rate by 45% through shift-left testing initiatives
